/usr/bin/ar qc libsure_smartie_core.a CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/core/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/core/Config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/core/ConfigSerializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/core/ConfigValidator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/core/GlyphSupport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/core/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/core/MetricsSnapshotService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/core/PreviewFrameRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/display/DisplayFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/display/StdoutDisplayDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/display/SureDisplayDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/engine/ScreenManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/engine/TemplateEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/plugins/PluginLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/src/serial/SerialPort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/providers/BuiltinProviderFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/providers/CpuProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/providers/GpuProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/providers/NetworkProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/providers/RamProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sure_smartie_core.dir/providers/SystemProvider.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsure_smartie_core.a
